turns.job: Identify the highest-value solvable questions hidden in the seed material and separate decision-critical questions from merely interesting questions.
Find or extract the strongest allowed evidence, data, factual anchors, and source candidates for the questions Gov prioritizes.
Attack assumptions, source quality, causal jumps, missing stakeholders, and claims that practitioners would reject.
Turn evidence collisions and contradictions into fresh, useful, decision-relevant insight.
Resolve or explicitly mark open gaps, missing decisive sources, confidence limits, and HR-10 unlock conditions.
Package the final research packet for HoloBuild with question ledger, source ledger, contradiction ledger, evidence strengths, unresolved gaps, and builder implications.

hr10_unlock_turns.job: Repair missing decisive source classes or weak evidence that blocks builder handoff.
Resolve material contradictions or produce a clear confidence-bounded fork.
Pressure-test the research packet against domain-owner objections and decision constraints.
Produce the final deep-mode research packet and explain what HR-10 added beyond HR-6.

gov_continuity_rule: Gov remains fixed for the full HoloResearch session unless the run contract explicitly defines an ablation.
